title: poa bolanderi subsp. chandleri
intro: Poa bolanderi subsp. chandleri, also known as Chandler's blue grass, is a subspecies of grass within the Poa genus, characterized by its slender leaves and blue-green foliage. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Poa bolanderi subsp. chandleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
